name: year
description: Reference year of the ATUS interview (diary year).
observations: Partition column. Derived from the first four digits of tucaseid.

name: tucaseid
description: ATUS case identification number; primary key that links all ATUS files. First four digits are the interview year.

name: teage_ec
description: Age of the eldercare recipient in years (topcoded at 85).

name: teeldur
description: How long have you provided care to [NAME]?

name: teelwho
description: Who did you give this care to?

name: teelyrs
description: How many years have you provided care (to this person)?

name: trelhh
description: Eldercare recipient is a household member

name: tulineno
description: ATUS person line number identifying each individual within the household.
